mnemonics: WISE Agent: Wumpus World uses Inference, Sensors, and an Expert system architecture
keyPoints: The Wumpus World is a classic AI problem used to demonstrate logical inference and knowledge representation
An Expert System for this domain uses a knowledge base of rules (e.g., breezes indicate pits) and an inference engine to make decisions
The agent must safely navigate the grid, inferring the locations of the Wumpus, pits, and gold from percepts to avoid death and find the goal
commonMistakes: Forgetting that the stench percept is only for adjacent squares to the Wumpus, not diagonal ones
Assuming a breeze means a pit is in every adjacent square, when it only means at least one pit is present
Not properly updating the knowledge base after each move, leading to logical inconsistencies and poor decisions
